query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A sedan is parked in a snowy area, its hood, windshield, and front wheel covered in a thick layer of snow. Part of a second vehicle is visible in the upper right background. Snow blankets the ground around the cars, creating a continuous white surface that merges with the lower portion of the scene.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A sedan in a snowy parking area is overwhelmed by extreme overexposure that blows out most of the frame into brilliant white, dissolving the snow-covered hood, windshield, and surrounding ground into a luminous void with almost no surviving surface detail. Only fragments of the front wheel, tire, and a sliver of a second vehicle in the upper right remain partially visible, while tight cropping at the frame edges aggressively cuts off portions of the cars.
